heading: Land tenure adjustments
label: 410aaa–72 Land tenure adjustments
text: In preparing land tenure adjustment decisions with the California Desert Conservation Area, of the Bureau of Land Management, the Secretary shall give priority to consolidating Federal ownership within the national park units and wilderness areas designated by this Act.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is defined in , which is set out as a Definitions note under .section 3 of Pub. L. 103–433section 410aaa of this title
